name: Purple Plum Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sliced plums with 1/2 cup sugar, 1/4 cup flour, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 1/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon, and 1 tablespoon lemon juice.
2. Pour this mixture into the unbaked pastry shell.
3. For the topping, mix together 1/2 cup sugar, 1/2 cup all-purpose flour, 1/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon, and 1/4 teaspoon ground nutmeg in a small bowl.
4. Cut in the cold butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Sprinkle this crumbly topping over the filling.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 50-60 minutes or until bubbly and golden brown. Cover the edges of the crust during the last 20 minutes to prevent overbrowning.
7. Cool on a wire rack. Yield: 8 servings.
